overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving along a coastal highway bridge before transitioning into a dense futuristic urban canyon with heavy traffic and elevated train tracks. The scene features bright daylight, clear skies, and a mix of open waterfront views and enclosed city driving.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated coastal highway bridge with waterfront views

agents.ego_description: driving along an elevated coastal highway with water visible to the right and a large building structure overhanging from the left

notable_agents.action: futuristic black sedan driving in the left lane, overtaking the ego vehicle

entered.detail: large futuristic building with overhanging sections covering part of the road
large purple and yellow advertisement billboard featuring an anime-style character
calm ocean water with distant industrial platforms visible on the horizon
concrete safety barrier separating the road from the water edge

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunny coastal highway bridge with the ocean visible to the right. A large building structure looms on the left, partially covering the road. A prominent purple billboard stands out against the blue sky and water. Traffic is moderate with futuristic vehicles passing in the left lane.

events.description: enters dark covered passage under the building structure, significantly reducing ambient light
exits the underpass back into bright daylight

agents.ego_description: passing through a short dark underpass section beneath the building

entered.detail: dark concrete walls of the underpass passage creating a tunnel-like effect

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a brief dark underpass beneath the building structure, with concrete walls enclosing the view. The lighting drops significantly before quickly emerging back into daylight.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront promenade with open city views

events.description: exits underpass back to open waterfront view with distant city skyline visible across the water

agents.ego_description: driving along the curved waterfront road with open views of the water and distant city skyline

entered.detail: calm ocean water with distant industrial structures and platforms
futuristic skyscrapers visible across the water in the distance
metal safety railing along the water edge

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the view opens up to a wide waterfront curve with the city skyline visible across the water. The purple billboard remains visible on the left while the road bends gently, revealing more of the distant urban landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban highway through futuristic city canyon with elevated transit

events.description: transitions from waterfront bridge to dense urban highway surrounded by towering skyscrapers
yellow elevated train cars pass overhead on the transit tracks

agents.ego_description: navigating through heavy traffic on a multi-lane highway surrounded by towering futuristic buildings and neon advertisements

notable_agents.action: purple sedan maintaining position in the left lane alongside the ego vehicle
teal sports car overtaking on the right side

entered.detail: elevated transit rail system running above the highway with support pillars
tall glass and steel buildings with neon cyan accents and digital signage
tall glass and steel buildings with neon cyan accents creating an urban canyon
vertical digital advertisement screens mounted on highway support pillars
vertical digital advertisement screens showing various advertisements

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions dramatically into a dense futuristic urban canyon with heavy traffic flowing in multiple lanes. Towering glass skyscrapers line both sides of the highway, while elevated train tracks run overhead. Neon billboards and digital signage adorn the highway pillars. The traffic is dense with various futuristic vehicles including sedans, sports cars, and trucks moving at high speed through the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open coastal highway into the claustrophobic depths of a futuristic urban canyon. It begins on a sunny bridge beside the ocean, passing a prominent purple billboard and a looming building structure under a clear blue sky. As the vehicle enters a dark concrete underpass, the lighting drops sharply before quickly emerging back into the daylight to reveal a wide waterfront curve and the distant city skyline. The scene then transitions dramatically as the road bends, shifting from the open coast into a dense corridor of towering glass skyscrapers and overhead train tracks. Finally, the environment becomes a high-speed urban artery filled with heavy traffic and neon digital signage adorning the highway pillars.
